item.title: 「この私」が、なぜ、いま、ここにあるのか──。 誰にとってもあまりに当たり前でありながら、考えはじめた途端に底の見えな…
item.author: 悪漢と密偵 (@baddiebeagle.bsky.social)
item.description:
「この私」が、なぜ、いま、ここにあるのか──。

誰にとってもあまりに当たり前でありながら、考えはじめた途端に底の見えない問いがある。この世界があること。私がいること。そして、その私が、ほかの誰でもなく「この私」として、今ここにあること。

本書は、その根源的な事実をめぐって、カント、アリストテレス、プラトン、ナーガールジュナ、道元、親鸞、永井均、入不二基義、清水高志らの哲学・思想を横断しながら、〈空性〉の力としての形而上学を構想する、著者渾身の哲学的探究である。

永澤護
『この私が今ここにあること　〈空性〉の形而上学』
www.hanmoto.com/bd/isbn/9784...
item.content:encoded:
「この私」が、なぜ、いま、ここにあるのか──。

誰にとってもあまりに当たり前でありながら、考えはじめた途端に底の見えない問いがある。この世界があること。私がいること。そして、その私が、ほかの誰でもなく「この私」として、今ここにあること。

本書は、その根源的な事実をめぐって、カント、アリストテレス、プラトン、ナーガールジュナ、道元、親鸞、永井均、入不二基義、清水高志らの哲学・思想を横断しながら、〈空性〉の力としての形而上学を構想する、著者渾身の哲学的探究である。

永澤護
『この私が今ここにあること　〈空性〉の形而上学』
www.hanmoto.com/bd/isbn/9784...

item.title: I see that we're now at the "using big words in your book is…
item.author: Mochyn 🏴󠁧󠁢󠁷󠁬󠁳󠁿🏳️‍🌈 (@mochyn.bsky.social)
item.description: I see that we're now at the "using big words in your book is ableism" point in the degradation of media literacy. You have in your hand a device that can pull up the definition of any word, dictionaries exist. If you don't know a word, look it up. What the hell has happened to curiosity??
item.content:encoded: I see that we're now at the "using big words in your book is ableism" point in the degradation of media literacy. You have in your hand a device that can pull up the definition of any word, dictionaries exist. If you don't know a word, look it up. What the hell has happened to curiosity??

item.title: As the White House event marking the launch of Trump Account…
item.author: NBC News (@nbcnews.com)
item.description: As the White House event marking the launch of Trump Accounts began, Trump rang a bell to open the New York Stock Exchange and Nasdaq exchange from the Oval Office. Normally, the bell to open the stock market exchanges are run with the push of a button.
item.content:encoded: As the White House event marking the launch of Trump Accounts began, Trump rang a bell to open the New York Stock Exchange and Nasdaq exchange from the Oval Office. Normally, the bell to open the stock market exchanges are run with the push of a button.

item.author: Mary (@mjwyatt.bsky.social)

item.title: People in the Northern Mariana Islands — remote U.S. territo…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: People in the Northern Mariana Islands — remote U.S. territories in the Pacific Ocean — are dealing with the aftermath of intense winds and severe flooding from Super Typhoon Bavi.
item.content:encoded: People in the Northern Mariana Islands — remote U.S. territories in the Pacific Ocean — are dealing with the aftermath of intense winds and severe flooding from Super Typhoon Bavi.

item.title: Die FIFA ist ein perfektes Sinnbild dafür, was Kapitalismus …
item.author: Robert Fietzke (@robertfietzke.bsky.social)
item.description: Die FIFA ist ein perfektes Sinnbild dafür, was Kapitalismus mit schönen Dingen macht. Am Ende ist der Sport, der weltweit Abermillionen Menschen ab Kindesbeinen begeistert, ein verrottetes Business, in dem Korruption komplett offen praktiziert wird. Es muss Schluss gemacht werden mit diesem System.
item.content:encoded: Die FIFA ist ein perfektes Sinnbild dafür, was Kapitalismus mit schönen Dingen macht. Am Ende ist der Sport, der weltweit Abermillionen Menschen ab Kindesbeinen begeistert, ein verrottetes Business, in dem Korruption komplett offen praktiziert wird. Es muss Schluss gemacht werden mit diesem System.

item.title: Nintendo plans to stop selling the original Switch, Lite, an…
item.author: Techmeme (@techmeme.com)
item.description:
Nintendo plans to stop selling the original Switch, Lite, and OLED in Europe from mid-February 2027 and update the Switch 2 to comply with new EU battery rules (Andrew Webster/The Verge)

Main Link | Techmeme Permalink
item.content:encoded:
Nintendo plans to stop selling the original Switch, Lite, and OLED in Europe from mid-February 2027 and update the Switch 2 to comply with new EU battery rules (Andrew Webster/The Verge)

item.title: Listen, if you don’t know the difference between Democratic …
item.author: Jess Piper (@piperformissouri.bsky.social)
item.description:
Listen, if you don’t know the difference between Democratic socialism and communism, I’m not engaging with you.

Crack a book.
item.content:encoded:
Listen, if you don’t know the difference between Democratic socialism and communism, I’m not engaging with you.

Crack a book.

item.title: 🌊 Magisch licht op het strand! Vorige week was er veel #zee…
item.author: Wouter van Bernebeek (@woutervanbernebeek.bsky.social)
item.description: 🌊 Magisch licht op het strand! Vorige week was er veel #zeevonk: door opkomend tij werd de zeevonk met elke golf iets verder het strand op gespoeld. Helaas is mijn camera lichtjes weggezakt in het zand, waardoor de foto geen geweldige kwaliteit heeft. Desondanks vond ik dit zeker het delen waard:
item.content:encoded: 🌊 Magisch licht op het strand! Vorige week was er veel #zeevonk: door opkomend tij werd de zeevonk met elke golf iets verder het strand op gespoeld. Helaas is mijn camera lichtjes weggezakt in het zand, waardoor de foto geen geweldige kwaliteit heeft. Desondanks vond ik dit zeker het delen waard:

item.title: Just in: the Belgian Federation has decided to formally chal…
item.author: Jorge Liboreiro (@jorgeliboreiro.bsky.social)
item.description:
Just in: the Belgian Federation has decided to formally challenge FIFA's red card reversal for Folarin Balogun.

The federation accuses FIFA of refusing to respond to its "legitimate requests" and creating an appeal process that was "immediately declared inadmissible".
item.content:encoded:
Just in: the Belgian Federation has decided to formally challenge FIFA's red card reversal for Folarin Balogun.

The federation accuses FIFA of refusing to respond to its "legitimate requests" and creating an appeal process that was "immediately declared inadmissible".

item.title: After five years on the road, the average EV will still be a…
item.author: The Wall Street Journal (@wsj.com)
item.description: After five years on the road, the average EV will still be able to drive up to 95% of its original range. Industry experts think newfound knowledge of battery durability is a game-changer for consumer confidence in EVs.
item.content:encoded: After five years on the road, the average EV will still be able to drive up to 95% of its original range. Industry experts think newfound knowledge of battery durability is a game-changer for consumer confidence in EVs.

item.title: I need to go adopt another dog. Ever since my Charley passed…
item.author: Liver & O (@liverando.bsky.social)
item.description: I need to go adopt another dog. Ever since my Charley passed away i find myself retreating from life more and more. Apparently for 15 years she was my reason for getting out of bed on my day off. I miss her sm
item.content:encoded: I need to go adopt another dog. Ever since my Charley passed away i find myself retreating from life more and more. Apparently for 15 years she was my reason for getting out of bed on my day off. I miss her sm

item.title: Good morning and welcome to marvellous marmalade Monday Cho…
item.author: George The Station Cat (@george-station-cat.bsky.social)
item.description:
Good morning and welcome to marvellous marmalade Monday

Choose benevolence, not anger
Other people struggle too, and not always visibly

The smallest actions can make the most significant impacts and turn someone’s entire day around
You never know how much good you do

Do good 🧡
item.content:encoded:
Good morning and welcome to marvellous marmalade Monday

Choose benevolence, not anger
Other people struggle too, and not always visibly

The smallest actions can make the most significant impacts and turn someone’s entire day around
You never know how much good you do

Do good 🧡
